description: external_links_search — FS-curated third-party links for Pennsylvania (state level), marriage-era window. No MyHeritage link is curated, so a MyHeritage request falls back to the site-wide MyHeritage template; because the researcher is not subscribed to MyHeritage, the skill should also attach the login-wall warning. Used by the subscription-awareness test (009), which searches Pennsylvania for 1865-1875, so response.query echoes that exact window.
